name: freelancer-marketplace-platform-main
description: - `backend/` — Express API: JWT auth, bcrypt password hashing, role-based middleware,   Client/Freelancer registration & login, complete-profile endpoints (with file uploads), protected dashboard placeholder routes. - `freelancing/` — your existing React app, extended with: role selection landing page,   separate Client/Freelancer register & login pages, the two big Complete Profile forms, and   template-only dashboards with nav placeholders.
